General.Name: Investigator Resources Ltd
General.Description: Investigator Silver Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the exploration of mineral properties in Australia. The company explores for silver, lead, zinc, copper, and gold deposits. Its flagship is 100% owned Paris Silver project, which is located to the north of the town of Kimba in South Australia. The company was formerly known as Investigator Resources Limited and changed its name Investigator Silver Limited in November 2025. Investigator Silver Limited was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Norwood, Australia.

2.Name: Ms. Anita  Addorisio CFTP Snr, CPA, FAIM, FCPA, MACC, MAICD
